openRouterSyncSuccess: OpenRouter synced: {{imported}} models imported ({{created}} new, {{updated}} updated, {{purged}} purged).
pageBaseline: Manage the shared catalog used by the Models page and onboarding.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, or provider
importHelp: OpenRouter import uses search, provider, chat/instruct type, minimum context, and Tools as filters. `Free` only filters the list displayed on this page. Purge removes older OpenRouter imports whose provider is no longer supported. Purge missing removes OpenRouter imports that are no longer returned by the OpenRouter API.
noOrganizationSelected: Select an organization to load the catalog.
providersPanelHint: Providers displayed in the API keys panel only come from active models in this catalog.
